164 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

POST-LAB 10 QUESTIONS (2 points) Last Name: _______________________ First Name: _________________________ 1. What muscles, in the dermis are responsible for erecting hair follicles? (0.5 points) 2. While examining a patient’s eye, a doctor instructs them to move their right eye upward, to the left. Which muscles of the eye were utilized to perform this task? (0.5 points) 3. What muscle of the cervical region has two origins? (0.5 points)
